title: Nirvana-Biomes
description: Add a new Biome and change the default biome into colourful biomes, 6 Different colour biomes that make minecraft more beautiful
body:
Nirvana-Biomes mod.

Nirvana Biomes Mod is a Forge and NeoForge Based mod.
It's a simple biome mod that add nirvana biome in Minecraft with 6 different color biomes.
nirvana biome is a custom biome that make Minecraft more beautiful.
Nirvana Biomes is for both Overworld and Nether.

# This Mod Add 2 Biomes
1] Nirvana Biome Overworld
2] Nirvana Biome Nether

also modifies there are 6 variety,6 different color grass and trees.
gives you a whole new different experience.
colors are sea-green, white , purple , golden , razzmatazz pink and vivid azure

THERE ARE MANY CHANGES IN THE GRAPHICS
CHANGES ARE -
1)Grass
2)Leaves
3)Colormap
4)Environment
5)GUI title
6)Sugarcane
7)Biomes

# 1.2.0 update-
1] Nirvana Trader {Nirvana Master}
2] Nirvana Armor
3] Nirvana Destroyer {Weapon}
4] Nirvana Block {Ore}

# Nirvana Block available only in Nirvana Biomes coordinate from 19 to -19
# Nirvana Trader take job from Nirvana Block


this mod is compatible with various shaders, realistic texture pack, with great potential.

Best Texture pack for the mods
1)HexaBiome Nirvana [compulsory if your are using any realistic texture pack also it should in top]
2)Round Trees
3)Coven 64x,128x,256x,512x

Best Shaders for the mods
1)Bliss [Distant Horizon Support]
2)Complementary Unbound
3)BSL

Mods Support
1)Oculus
2)Embeddium
3)Bobby
4)Distant Horizon
5)OptiFine
6)Sodium
etc

compatible with both single world and servers.

enjoy the mod
make your Minecraft Beautiful.

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADIND.
